title: BK8 — Back-8 cool-down (Robotron)
tldr: GWAVE preset with `COOLDN-GFRTAB` pattern — descending tones marking a cool-down period. Robotron's variant on Defender's `CLDWNV`.
how: GWAVE preset bytes pointing at the `COOLDN` pattern in `GFRTAB`. Each echo iteration steps down through the pattern, producing a descending arpeggio similar to CLDWNV's shape.
watch: GWAVE engine view — descending pattern walk.
